title: OrbitalStrikeCannon
description: This mod adds the Orbital Strike Cannon from Wembu's videos.
body:
**WARNING: This mod does not add new items. It uses a renamed Fishing Rod as a trigger.**

**Payload Types**

Nuke Shot – Calls down a massive TNT orbital strike.

Stab Shot – A precise, focused strike that bores deep into the ground. Has two modes: Default (instant) and Redstone (experimental, based on real TNT cannon mechanics).

Nuke – The Nuke seen in Wembu's videos.

einzelnd die beschreibung dafür schreiben?

Cube Strike – Fires a 9x5 grid of Stab Shots across a 40x40 block area, row by row with a 2 second delay between each row. Uses the currently selected Stab Shot mode (Default or Redstone).

**Fishing Rod Triggers**

Rename a fishing rod to Nuke Shot, Stab Shot, or Nuke and right-click to unleash that strike.'

**Command System**

/paiload <type> <pos> – Preloads a payload at the given coordinates (supports ~ ~ ~). Types: nuke_shot, stab_shot, nuke

/fire – Launches all queued payloads in sequence.

/rod <type> – Gives you a rod that triggers the selected payload.

/stabmode <default|redstone> – Switches the Stab Shot between Default and Redstone mode.

Works in both singleplayer and multiplayer. For multiplayer the mod only needs to be installed on the server, not the client.

**Disclaimer: This mod is for fun and chaos. Expect large explosions and possible lag with heavy use.**
